evidence_basis.climate_change_risk: Elevated CO2 compresses latent period; extreme events increase risk

season_rules.description: Red rot outbreaks are restricted to the monsoon and post-monsoon season. Disease incidence is 0 % in May-June, rises sharply from July, peaks in the 2nd fortnight of August, and tapers through October-November. Predictions outside months 6-11 should be treated as low-confidence.

lag_rules.description: T2M_MIN (minimum temperature) in one 15-day window is NEGATIVELY correlated with disease incidence in the NEXT 15-day window (R² 0.82-0.87, SMRA validated). A LOWER T2M_MIN now predicts HIGHER disease incidence 15 days later. RH2M lag of 15 days is a validated secondary predictor. Models must include lag_15d versions of T2M_MIN and RH2M as mandatory features.
lag_rules.validation_rule: For a HIGH-risk prediction to be domain-consistent, T2M_MIN_lag_15d must be >= 24 deg C (warm monsoon minimum). If T2M_MIN_lag_15d < 20 deg C, the prediction is likely a false positive.

humidity.rule: RH2M must exceed 85 % for at least 7 consecutive days to support outbreak risk.

rainfall.rule: PRECTOTCORR must exceed 10 mm/day for at least 5 consecutive days, or 115 mm accumulated over 15 days, to confirm rain-driven inoculum dispersal.

temperature.rule: T2M must remain within 24-33 deg C for at least 14 consecutive days to maintain conditions favorable for pathogen growth and infection.

temperature.feature_T2M_MAX: < 36.9 deg C (disease present); peak ~33.1 deg C
temperature.note: Use ranges, not exact thresholds, to avoid overfitting.

humidity.note: Morning RH is the more reliable indicator than evening RH.

rainfall.note: Unseasonal heavy rain outside monsoon is also a risk flag.

soil_inoculum.note: Inoculum from previous season remains viable for 60-90 days.

7d.role: Short-term humidity and temperature persistence check.

14d.role: Primary outbreak buildup window. 14-day accumulation of temp + humidity is the minimum sustained condition needed before visible symptoms appear.

28d.role: Epidemic onset predictor. 28-day climate trend captures the full monsoon buildup phase and correlates with epidemic-level disease development.

15d_lag.role: Primary prediction lag window (SMRA validated R² 0.82-0.87). T2M_MIN 15 days ago is the strongest single predictor of current disease incidence.

trigger_conditions.name: Rainfall pulse — inoculum dispersal risk
trigger_conditions.condition: PRECTOTCORR > 10 mm/day for >= 5 consecutive days AND month in [7,8,9,10]

trigger_conditions.name: Combined high-risk composite
trigger_conditions.condition: EW-01 AND EW-02 AND month in [7,8,9,10]

early_warning_rules.description: Early warning is triggered when 2+ conditions from EW-01 to EW-05 are met. EW-06 (composite) alone is sufficient for a HIGH-risk alert. Lead time of 3-7 days aligns with the shortest validated latent period (7 days spindle). The 15-day lag rule (EW-05) provides the longest lead for field intervention.

validation_logic.description: Rules to validate ML model predictions against domain knowledge. A model output is domain_consistent only if ALL mandatory checks pass.

high_risk_checks.name: season_check
high_risk_checks.reason: Red rot outbreaks are biologically impossible outside monsoon season.

high_risk_checks.name: lag_check
high_risk_checks.reason: SMRA validated: low T2M_MIN or RH2M 15 days ago contradicts high-risk prediction.

high_risk_checks.name: accumulation_check
high_risk_checks.rule: At least ONE of: (RH2M_rolling_mean_7d >= 85) OR (PRECTOTCORR_rolling_sum_14d >= 50 mm) OR (T2M_rolling_mean_14d in [29, 31])
high_risk_checks.reason: High-risk without any accumulated environmental stress is biologically implausible.

high_risk_checks.name: temporal_window_check
high_risk_checks.rule: At least ONE rolling window feature must exceed its threshold: RH2M_rolling_mean_14d >= 79 OR T2M_rolling_mean_14d >= 29.4 OR PRECTOTCORR_rolling_sum_28d >= 100 mm
high_risk_checks.reason: Sustained conditions over 14-28 days are required for epidemic-level risk.

low_risk_override.rule: If month NOT in [6,7,8,9,10,11] AND T2M < 24 AND RH2M < 70, override model prediction to LOW regardless of model output.
